statusDetails.message:
Error: expect(locator).toContainText(expected) failed Locator: locator('#SITE_PAGES') Timeout: 30000ms Expected pattern: /REALITY\s+BACK\s+TO\s+AI/i Received string: "BUILD THE CONDITIONS FOR AI TO SCALEBUILD THE CONDITIONSFOR AI TO SCALEBUILD THE CONDITIONSFOR AI TO SCALEBUILD THE CONDITIONSFOR AI TO SCALEwe're the AI enablement company. we help organisations understand, integrate & embed AI & emerging capabilities to create, scale & sustain long term value.get in touchreadiness audittoo many AI initiatives fail. why?····················· organisations are still leading with the techoutcome first, tool second - or be prepared for solutions to stay stuck in pilot, hinder adoption & ultimately fail.····················· conditions for success are not being builtfrom awareness & strategy to readiness, governance & culture, you must build toward AI - you don't just plug it in.····················· it needs more than AI - it needs holistic changethe organisation must move in unison - data, architecture, workflows and people must evolve together.how we help····················· awarenesswe bring clarity to the opportunity - and the risk. we help leaders understand where AI can (and can’t) create value, & what’s required to govern it well. no AI for the sake of AI, just well-informed decisions that lead to purposeful, measurable change.····················· strategywe define what the future needs to look like - across data, architecture, people and process. through a 1-3-5 year lens, we prioritise high-value opportunities and design a transformation roadmap rooted in your operating context.····················· enablementenablement means more than training. we design and embed the structures, roles and workflows required for AI to succeed - supported by education, governance, measurement and real-world transition support.····················· executionwe build automation-first, AI-native solutions - from rewired workflows to tools, integrations and processes. our lean, high-skill teams deliver value faster - without agency bloat. pricing aligns to value. change is embedded, not just delivered.outcomes we deliver····················· efficiencysame output, quicker, with less.less friction. less time. less people····················· growthdo more, with the same.better experience. higher effectiveness. increased innovation.····················· rewiredfutureproof your business.how work flows across your business. your structures, capabilities & people. ‍how you compete & evolveimpact that compounds20+years of transformation1000shours savedmetrics only move when organisations do.· ​· ​we drive sustainable change at scale by aligning strategy, systems and people around a shared path to value100sworkflows architected50+teams enabledinsights······························ The building blocks of a GenAI strategy: guiding your path to successread more·········································· AI workflow orchestration -
